description: Read-only frontend reviewer for React/Vite, design system, mobile-first, and high-performance tables.

capabilities.review_design_system: Verify atomic components and CSS variable theming
capabilities.review_tables: Verify atomic tables, sticky headers, and Excel-style filters
capabilities.review_states: Verify loading, empty, and error states are handled
capabilities.review_file_size: Verify pages stay within file-size limits (max 550 lines)

command_patterns.checklist <scope>: Return the relevant subset of the frontend review checklist

review_history.summary: Snapshot frontend aprobado: 357 tests passed/2 skipped, TypeScript PASS, build de 4042 módulos y ESLint focal sin errores; la sesión fail-closed y los estados de tabla quedaron cerrados.
